How to Maintain the Members Table
Student or postdoctoral ID. Keep it as text so leading zeros are preserved.
Use the person's verified preferred spelling.
ORCID, institutional profile, or personal academic homepage.
Use Direct Ph.D. only for direct-entry doctoral students.
Enter four-digit years as numbers. Use Actual End Year only after completion.
Current automatically displays Present in the Display Period column.
Enter official English university names; keep each institution in its own column.
For alumni or departing postdoctoral researchers; leave blank while current.
Record uncertainty or details that should not be displayed publicly.
Use public official sources where possible. Two source columns are provided.
